title: CBP Relocation Act
stage_label: Referred to the Subcommittee on Oversight, Investigations, and Accountability.
crs_summary: U.S. Customs and Border Protection Relocation Act or the CBP Relocation Act This bill requires the Department of Homeland Security to relocate the headquarters of U.S. Customs and Border Protection (including the functions, personnel, and real assets of the headquarters) to Texas no later than January 1, 2026.
last_action_text: Referred to the Subcommittee on Oversight, Investigations, and Accountability.
